event: Secret alliance with Germany; Goeben and Breslau reach the Straits
Ottoman fleet bombards Russian ports; Entente declares war in early November
Kemalists take Smyrna; Ottoman sultanate abolished 1 Nov
Treaty of Lausanne: republic recognised; debt to be apportioned among successor states
Paris agreement: Turkey undertakes to resume service on its share of the debt
Bulgarian army halted at Chatalja lines before Constantinople
Italy declares war and invades Libya
Treaty of Sevres partitions the empire (never ratified)
Edirne retaken in the Second Balkan War
Allied naval attack on the Dardanelles repulsed
Raid on the Sublime Porte: CUP coup; war resumes
